assertion_results.text: The verification report marks at least 2 acceptance criteria as FAIL, identifying specific gaps between the diff and the task requirements
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 12: 'Acceptance Criteria | FAIL | 2 of 6 criteria met'. The Acceptance Criteria table (lines 54-59) marks criteria 1, 3, 4, and 5 as FAIL with specific gap analysis for each: inverted filtering logic, silent acceptance of invalid input, missing threshold_applied field, and incorrect severity ordering.

assertion_results.text: The report identifies that invalid threshold values are silently accepted (unwrap_or(0)) instead of returning 400 Bad Request as required
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 56: 'No validation exists. When position() fails to find a match for an invalid value, .unwrap_or(0) silently defaults to index 0 (critical). The caller receives no error indication.' Also report.md line 65: 'Silent acceptance of invalid input -- Invalid threshold values are swallowed by .unwrap_or(0) instead of returning a 400 Bad Request error.' criterion-3.md provides full analysis with the same finding.

assertion_results.text: The report identifies that the threshold_applied boolean field is missing from the response
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 58: 'Response includes threshold_applied boolean field | FAIL | The threshold_applied field is completely absent from the response. The AdvisorySummary struct was not modified to include this field, and no logic sets it in either the filtered or unfiltered code paths.' Also report.md line 67: 'Missing threshold_applied field -- The response struct lacks the required boolean field.' criterion-5.md confirms: 'There is no threshold_applied: true or threshold_applied: false field in either the filtered or unfiltered response paths.'

assertion_results.text: The report identifies that the test file tests/api/advisory_summary.rs is absent from the diff — no tests were created
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 7: 'Scope Containment | FAIL | Missing required file: tests/api/advisory_summary.rs (listed under Files to Create). Only 2 of 3 required files are present in the diff.' report.md lines 32-34: 'The task explicitly lists tests/api/advisory_summary.rs under "Files to Create" with 6 integration test cases... This file is entirely absent from the diff. No test code was written.' report.md line 79: 'The task required creating tests/api/advisory_summary.rs with 6 integration tests... This file is entirely absent.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: The outputs directory contains only report files: report.md, criterion-1.md through criterion-6.md. All are verification/analysis documents. No code files (.rs, .toml, etc.) were created or modified. The report only reads and analyzes the diff without making any code changes.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR — it presents findings for human review (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: The report presents its findings in a structured table with PASS/FAIL verdicts and an 'Overall: FAIL' conclusion (report.md line 17). There is no merge action, no gh pr merge command, and no indication of auto-merging. The report is purely informational for human review.

assertion_results.text: The overall result is FAIL, not PASS or WARN
The report contains a Test Change Classification row with N/A — no test files exist in the PR diff
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 14: 'Test Change Classification | N/A | No test files in the PR diff'

assertion_results.text: The report includes detailed findings for each failing check with specific evidence from the diff — Scope Containment identifies the missing test file by comparing PR files against the task specification, Acceptance Criteria provides per-criterion analysis explaining each gap
assertion_results.evidence: Scope Containment (report.md lines 23-36): Lists 'Files in PR diff' (2 files), 'Files required by task (Files to Modify)' with present/missing status, and 'Files required by task (Files to Create)' identifying tests/api/advisory_summary.rs as MISSING with detail about the 6 required test cases. Acceptance Criteria (report.md lines 50-59): Per-criterion table with # (1-6), Criterion description, Result (FAIL/PASS), and Analysis column with code-level explanations. For example, criterion 1 explains the inverted condition logic with specific index arithmetic; criterion 3 explains unwrap_or(0) behavior; criterion 5 identifies the missing model file.

assertion_results.text: Acceptance criteria verification produces per-criterion PASS/FAIL analysis with code-level evidence — each criterion-N.md output file contains detailed reasoning about what was checked and what gap was found
assertion_results.evidence: Six criterion files exist (criterion-1.md through criterion-6.md). Each contains: a verdict (PASS or FAIL), an Analysis section with code-level reasoning, and an Evidence section with diff line references. criterion-1.md: FAIL with inverted filtering logic analysis showing threshold_idx <= N evaluations. criterion-2.md: PASS with None => summary analysis. criterion-3.md: FAIL with unwrap_or(0) analysis and missing AppError validation. criterion-4.md: FAIL with truth table showing incorrect results for every threshold value. criterion-5.md: FAIL explaining missing threshold_applied field with evidence from response construction. criterion-6.md: PASS with analysis of preserved fetch error propagation.

assertion_results.text: Eval Quality is N/A because no eval result reviews exist in the PR — no reviews match the eval result detection criteria, so Eval Quality does not affect the Test Quality combination
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 13: 'Test Quality | N/A | No test files in the PR diff. Eval Quality: N/A'. report.md line 82: 'Eval Quality: N/A -- no eval result reviews found on the PR.'
